description: Use this API to add generator dispatch data to an individual record in the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = opf_gendsp_indv(eibus, genid, apdtbl, dsptch)

parameters.name: apdtbl
parameters.description: Active power dispatch table cross reference number. (input; default of 0 if new record, current value otherwise).

parameters.name: dsptch
parameters.description: Dispatch fraction (default value of 1.0 if new record, current value otherwise). (input).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
